resumes.text:
John Doe
john.doe@example.com | (123) 456-7890 | Seattle, WA | github.com/johndoe | linkedin.com/in/johndoe

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, building, and deploying scalable web applications. Proficient in TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Proven track record of improving application performance by 40% and leading cross-functional teams.

SKILLS
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, SQL, HTML, CSS
- Frameworks & Libraries: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, TailwindCSS, Jest
- Tools & Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, AWS (S3, EC2, ECS), Git, CI/CD

EXPERIENCE
Lead Software Engineer | TechCorp, Seattle, WA | 2023 - Present
- Architected and built a microservices-based web application using Next.js and Node.js, serving over 500,000 monthly active users.
- Improved page load speed and core web vitals by 45% through optimized server-side rendering, code splitting, and caching strategies.
- Mentored 4 junior developers and established code review guidelines to improve team velocity and code quality.

Software Engineer | AppStart, San Francisco, CA | 2021 - 2023
- Developed new features for a customer-facing dashboard using React, Redux, and TailwindCSS.
- Integrated third-party APIs (Stripe, SendGrid) and reduced database query response times by 30% by writing optimized SQL indexes and query refactoring.
- Maintained 90%+ test coverage using Jest and React Testing Library.

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Washington | 2017 - 2021

analyses.summary: Software professional showing background in technical skills. Analysis highlights strong alignment with core development standards but shows opportunities for additional structural refinements.
analyses.strengths: ["Good representation of core technical stack and programming languages.","Clear employment history showing roles and responsibilities.","Good educational qualifications listed."]
analyses.weaknesses: ["Could benefit from more quantified metrics to show business impact.","Action verbs could be enhanced to show stronger leadership and ownership.","Lack of explicit detail regarding deployment pipelines and system scalability."]
analyses.suggestions: ["Quantify achievements under each job description with key metrics.","Add specific cloud technologies and deployment frameworks used.","Improve readability by utilizing clean formatting and bullet points."]
analyses.formattingIssues: ["Ensure consistent spacing and date formats throughout the document."]
